episodes.title: That'll Be 1 Button.
episodes.scene: Story will be focused on a NPC, who visited the wish house and met the magician who served her coffee. This is the introduction of this entire game VN.

episodes.title: Help Wanted, No Experience Required?
episodes.scene: Barista is heading home from school, he stumbles upon job ad poster. Desperate for a job to afford school and his dreams. He makes up his mind to attend the interview.

episodes.title: Operation MDI (MDI means Menu Development Initiative)
episodes.scene: Wizard & barista are working together to make the first Wish House menu. They struggle to find a balance between art and being reasonable.

episodes.title: Trial, Error, and Too Much Sugar
3:07PM
episodes.scene: Wish House is near schools and the student crowd came.

episodes.title: A Scared and Hungry Boy
episodes.scene: A scared and hungry boy in a dirty school uniform. Quiet, lonely.. bullied at school maybe.
